spec.name: The Mayor's Office
spec.description: You are in the not very big office of the Mayor of Midgaard. A large and polished but completely empty desk is standing in front of an armchair that looks so comfortable that it most of all resembles a bed with the head end raised slightly.

west.description: The waiting room is to the west.

extra_descs.description: This desk is obviously very old. Nevertheless it looks as if has never been used.

This chair is really a masterpiece. A chair where one can sit as comfortably as in a bed. All auditoriums should be equipped with these things. A shame that there wouldn't be room for the students too, though.
